items.name_en: YSL LouLou Puffer Washed Denim Bag
items.name_cn:
YSL LouLou Puffer Washed Denim Bag
This denim style has been a hit at counters this year. The washed denim feels soft and comfortable, with a chubby shape like holding a marshmallow. It has a high appearance value!
Full practicality + full retro style. It looks good and matches everything. Slightly smaller than YSL 25x17x6, Model 9009

items.name_en: YSL Monogram Caviar Envelope Bag. A super practical mini bag, the most classic style, upgraded to the highest version. 100% Italian calfskin with exquisite craftsmanship; custom metal YSL logo shows personality; flip-top design ensures security; small bag with large capacity, featuring 20 card slots, two bill compartments, two central compartments, and one zippered interior pocket. Model: S377828. Dimensions: 22x14x4cm

items.name_en: YSL Saint Laurent Shopping Bag. Truly have to admire how beautiful it really is. Chic girl/street style/ fashionista essential. New design with new fabric in a new matte deer skin texture. The feel and texture are super great. The stitching on this bag is neat and aligned, very classy. The capacity is sufficient and it has a zipper pocket inside! Whether matching with various outfits or attending various occasions, it's all ok. Come get one! Size 25-21-10
items.name_cn:
YSL Saint Laurent Shopping Bag. Truly have to admire how beautiful it really is. Chic girl/street style/ fashionista essential. New design with new fabric in a new matte deer skin texture. The feel and texture are super great. The stitching on this bag is neat and aligned, very classy. The capacity is sufficient and it has a zipper pocket inside! Whether matching with various outfits or attending various occasions, it's all ok. Come get one! Size 25-21-10
Code: 8151

items.name_en: YSL Straw Kate 99, the front flap features YSL lettering and tassel accessories, paired with a replaceable chain strap and an adjustable leather strap. The shoulder strap can also be removed to use as a clutch, making it suitable for evening parties! The double-strap design comes with a leather long strap and a chain, allowing for free swapping. Wearing the short chain makes it a trendy underarm bag!
items.name_cn:
YSL Straw Kate 99, the front flap features YSL lettering and tassel accessories, paired with a replaceable chain strap and an adjustable leather strap. The shoulder strap can also be removed to use as a clutch, making it suitable for evening parties! The double-strap design comes with a leather long strap and a chain, allowing for free swapping. Wearing the short chain makes it a trendy underarm bag!
Model: 604276
Size: 26*13.5*4.5cm
